ratingDrivers.description: Completeness: Two of fourteen mutation endpoints lack replay semantics; the rest are fully specified.
Consistency: Shipped behavior matches every specified clause; one undocumented deprecated field ships on.

localAnalysis.rationale: The contract matches shipped behavior where it speaks; two mutation endpoints without replay semantics cap completeness.
